adhyas 4 P.
1 To place upon another, add or append to.
2 (In Phil.) To attribute or ascribe falsely, attribute the nature of one thing to another; sarvo hi puro'vasthite viṣaye viṣayāṃtaramadhyasyati, bāhyadharmānātmanyadhyasyati  Ś. B.
